summary: Iteration 68: Verified all 5 fixes from the review request. All 12 pytest tests passed. (1) Grok model timeout increased with retry/fallback between models, (2) Bayesian fallback when ALL Grok models fail, (3) PredictionRequest.opponentId made optional with default 0, (4) nameClean field added for accent-stripped team matching, (5) Model name fixed: grok-4-1-fast-non-reasoning across all files.
critical_code_review_comments: Grok model name verified: grok-4-1-fast-non-reasoning in grok_engine.py (line 12) and server.py (line 199)
PredictionRequest.opponentId verified as optional with default 0 in models.py (line 41)
nameClean field verified in cache.py for accent-stripped team matching (lines 118, 145, 180, 207, 391-453)
Bayesian fallback verified in predict.py (lines 2062-2084) - triggers when ALL Grok models fail
Grok retry logic verified in predict.py (lines 2028-2060) - tries grok-3-mini first, then grok-4-1-fast-non-reasoning
Grok timeout increased to 40-45 seconds in predict.py (lines 2004, 2032, 2043, 2055)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 68 verified 5 fixes: (1) Grok model timeout increased from 8s to 40-45s with retry/fallback between grok-3-mini and grok-4-1-fast-non-reasoning. (2) Bayesian fallback when ALL Grok models fail - uses posteriorMean from early_bayes. (3) PredictionRequest.opponentId made optional with default 0 - allows AI-only mode when opponent data is missing. (4) nameClean field added to cache_teams for accent-stripped team matching (Bayern München ↔ bayern munich). (5) Model name inconsistency fixed: grok-4.1-fast → grok-4-1-fast-non-reasoning across all files. All tests passed including: predict with valid IDs, predict with opponentId=0 (AI-only mode), predict with both IDs=0 (full fallback), scan-prop with invalid base64 (graceful error), team resolution for Bayern Munich/Atletico Madrid/Borussia Mönchengladbach, player resolution for Joshua Kimmich/Harry Kane.

bayesian_fallback.trigger: ALL Grok models fail (no valid projectedValue)
bayesian_fallback.logging: [BAYESIAN FALLBACK] All Grok models failed — using Bayesian projection: {pv}

opponent_id_optional.effect: Allows AI-only mode when opponent data is missing
